title: Tilray Brands Delivers Record Q2 Fiscal 2026 Net Revenue of $218 Million
text: Tilray Brands reported record quarterly performance with net revenue reaching $217.5 million in the second quarter. International cannabis operations showed particularly robust expansion, with revenue climbing 36% year-over-year. Canadian adult-use cannabis grew 6% compared to the prior year period. The distribution segment, including Tilray Pharma operations, achieved its highest quarterly result at $85.3 million. The company strengthened its balance sheet significantly, holding $291.6 million in cash and marketable securities. Most notably, Tilray transitioned to a net cash position of $27.4 million, up substantially from a net debt position of $3.8 million in the prior quarter. While Tilray remained unprofitable on a GAAP basis with a net loss of $43.5 million, this represented substantial improvement from the prior year's $85.3 million loss. Adjusted EBITDA measured $8.4 million for the quarter. Management reaffirmed its full-year adjusted EBITDA guidance targeting $62 million–$72 million for fiscal 2026.
